# MobileDriversLicenseDataRequest.Response.DocumentElements.Sex.notSpecified

**Case**

A constant that indicates the mobile driver’s license holder’s sex was categorized as not specified or non-binary.

## Declaration

```swift
case notSpecified
```

## Discussion

This category is defined in the American Association of Motor Vehicle Administrators (AAMVA) implementation guidelines.
